headline: Q4 Rundown: Expeditors (NYSE:EXPD) Vs Other Air Freight and Logistics Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the air freight and logistics industry, including Expeditors (NYSE:EXPD) and its peers.
